// Plan-named adversarial (pin b): a top-level class Logger with an error method
// shadows the slf4j name. The gate is on the declared type, not the receiver
// name and not the method name - a local Logger.error is not a capture.
class LocalLoggerShadow {
    private final Logger log = new Logger();

    void m() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) { // want "JV001"
            log.error(e);
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}
}

class Logger {
    void error(Object... a) {}
}
